name: Ribbe
recipeInstructions:
1. Remove the pork chop part from the steak, if desired. If using a loin, increase baking time to 2.5 - 3 hours.
2. Break the ribs into pieces every 5 cm.
3. Make a checkerboard pattern on the skin side with a sharp knife.
4. Rub the salt and pepper over the meat 1-2 days before cooking and place it skin-side down.
5. Preheat the oven to 230°C.
6. Place the steak in the oven, skin-side down, and add some water to the tray.
7. Cover the steak and let it rest for 20 minutes.
8. Remove from the oven, turn the steak over, reduce temperature to 175°C, and place it higher in the oven.
9. Cook for an additional 1.5 - 2 hours until the skin is slightly crispy but not black.
10. Cut into pieces between the ribs and where the bones were broken.
11. Serve warm with surkaal (mustard), sweet mustard, and hot fat. It can also be served cold in slices or on bread.
Is also served cold. Either in pieces or sliced to go on a loaf of bread. Norwegians still prefer it with sweet mustard.
